prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BKCAHBSWCC-2PC-H-BLCK Product Type: AXE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Handheld 12 inch Camping Axe Hatchet Full Tang Forged Steel Description: This ASR Outdoor Lightweight Camping Hatchet is prefect for your backpacking, camping, and hunting needs.

The 4" blade and 12" full tang steel body gives you plenty of chopping potential. The handle has a stylish two piece real wood grip for a comfortable feel, and includes a lanyard hole.

The head of the axe includes 3 hex holes, allowing this hatchet to be used as a wrench in an emergency, reducing the overall weight for those long days of hiking. The butt of the axe also includes a cord cutter, gut hook for added versatility.

Additional features include a nylon sheath with a belt loop and a ridged thumb rest above the wooden grip for added dexterity. Search Terms: lightweight backpacker hunting axe camping hatchet survival multitool black steel cord cutter Features: - FULL TANG STEEL BLADE: One piece stainless steel axe blade is durable and easy to maintain - OUTDOOR USE: Lightweight body makes this ideal for camping, hunting, and hiking - VERSATILE: Includes 3 hex holes that function as an easy-to-use emergency wrench; Also features a cord cutter in the butt of the handle - AXE HEADCOVER: Nylon sheath with a belt-loop axe headcover included - SPECIFICATIONS: Blade Length: 4 inches, Overall Length: 12 inches, Grip Length: 4 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12 inch Black Camping Axe Hatchet

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang Steel, Emergency Wrench Hex Holes, Cord Cutter, Lightweight Backpacking, Nylon Sheath Included

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang Stainless Steel, 4" Blade, Cord Cutter, Hex Wrench Holes, Nylon Sheath, Belt-Loop, Wooden Grip
